description.en: Scatterplot FerryBox against logger based on the filtered parameter in joined dataframe. Option to summarise across specific waterbodies or latitudal transect of the FerryBox.

url_input_csv.title: Input joined CSV
url_input_csv.description: URL to Input joined CSV file.

waterbody_ids_to_summarize.title: Waterbody IDs/names
waterbody_ids_to_summarize.description: Waterbody IDs/names to summarise across. Can be omitted.

waterbody_id_col.title: Waterbody ID column name
waterbody_id_col.description: Waterbody ID column name in shapefile. Can be omitted.

latitude_min.title: Latitude minimum
latitude_min.description: Latitude range to summarise across: Minimum latitude. Can be omitted.

latitude_max.title: Latitude maximum
latitude_max.description: Latitude range to summarise across: Maximum latitude. Can be omitted.

study_area_layer.title: Study area layer
study_area_layer.description: Input of specific layer geometries if multiple are available in input waterbody file.

scatter_plot.title: Output plot
scatter_plot.description: Link to output plot from the process.
